Interface ImmutableMap<S extends @NonNull Object, T extends @Nullable Object>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of keys for this map
T - the type of contained mapped values
All Superinterfaces:
Iterable<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultImmutableMap
public interface ImmutableMap<S extends @NonNull Object, T extends @Nullable Object> extends Iterable<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>
An immutable data structure mapping keys to values. The map is not modified by any operation after creation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    containsKey(S key)
    Returns true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key.
    boolean
    containsValue(T value)
    Returns true if this map maps one or more keys to the specified value.
    @Nullable T
    get(S key)
    Retrieves the value mapped to the specified key in this map.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    Returns true if this map contains no entries.
    Iterator<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>
    iterator()
    Returns an iterator over the entries in this map.
    Iterator<S>
    keyIterator()
    Returns an iterator over the keys in this map.
    ImmutableMap<S,T>
    put(S key, T value)
    Adds a mapping <key, value> to the map (old map is not modified) If the key exists, the old entry will be overwritten.
    ImmutableMap<S,T>
    remove(S key)
    Removes the mapping for a key from this map if it is present.
    ImmutableMap<S,T>
    removeAll(T value)
    Removes all mappings for the specified value from this map.
    int
    size()
    Returns the number of entries in this map.
    Iterator<T>
    valueIterator()
    Returns an iterator over the values in this map.

    Methods inherited from interface Iterable

    forEach, spliterator

  • Method Details

    • put

      ImmutableMap<S,T> put(S key, T value)
      Adds a mapping <key, value> to the map (old map is not modified) If the key exists, the old entry will be overwritten.
      Parameters:
      key - the key with which the specified value is to be associated
      value - the value to be associated with the specified key
      Returns:
      the new mapping

    • get

      @Nullable T get(S key)
      Retrieves the value mapped to the specified key in this map.
      Parameters:
      key - the key whose associated value is to be returned
      Returns:
      the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if this map contains no mapping for the key

    • size

      int size()
      Returns the number of entries in this map.
      Returns:
      the number of entries in this map

    • isEmpty

      boolean isEmpty()
      Returns true if this map contains no entries.
      Returns:
      true if this map contains no entries

    • containsKey

      boolean containsKey(S key)
      Returns true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key.
      Parameters:
      key - the key whose presence in this map is to be tested
      Returns:
      true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key

    • containsValue

      boolean containsValue(T value)
      Returns true if this map maps one or more keys to the specified value. Comparison is modulo Object.equals(Object).
      Parameters:
      value - the value whose presence in this map is to be tested
      Returns:
      true if this map maps one or more keys to the specified value

    • remove

      ImmutableMap<S,T> remove(S key)
      Removes the mapping for a key from this map if it is present.
      Parameters:
      key - the key whose mapping is to be removed from the map
      Returns:
      the new map (the same if the key is not in the map)

    • removeAll

      ImmutableMap<S,T> removeAll(T value)
      Removes all mappings for the specified value from this map. Comparison is modulo Object.equals(Object).
      Parameters:
      value - the value whose mappings are to be removed from the map
      Returns:
      the new map (the same if the value is not mapped)

    • keyIterator

      Iterator<S> keyIterator()
      Returns an iterator over the keys in this map. The order is most recent first.
      Returns:
      an iterator over the keys in this map

    • valueIterator

      Iterator<T> valueIterator()
      Returns an iterator over the values in this map. If a value is contained multiple times, it will be returned multiple times. The order is most recent first.
      Returns:
      an iterator over the values in this map

    • iterator

      Iterator<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>> iterator()
      Returns an iterator over the entries in this map. The order is most recent first.
      Specified by:
      iterator in interface Iterable<S extends @NonNull Object>
      Returns:
      an iterator over the entries in this map
